meta.data_note: Per-town data from 50,784-ballot CVR sample (~99.9% of 50,845 total ballots); scaled to official Maine SOS district totals. Official R1 and Final round totals from SOS RCV Report (certified 2018-06-22); intermediate rounds estimated from sample ballot proportions.

popups.text: Jared Golden absorbs the most of Jonathan Fulford & Craig Olson's 6,482 combined ballots district-wide.
Jared Golden crosses the majority threshold of continuing ballots to win the district.

UOCAVA_UNMAPPED.label: UOCAVA / Unmapped Ballots
UOCAVA_UNMAPPED.description: Ballots included in race totals but not assigned to a Maine municipality. Includes overseas and military ballots (UOCAVA) and any precincts with only numeric identifiers in the CVR.
